name: Bachelor of Laws (Undergraduate Stream)
entry_requirement: Direct from school. Must pass numeracy test or complete MAM1013F.

year_1_preliminary.label: Year 1 (Preliminary Level)
year_1_preliminary.note: Plus one English (ELL) course or SLL1002S Word Power (15cr), plus two semester courses in another faculty (30cr)

year_2_preliminary.label: Year 2 (Preliminary Level continued)
year_2_preliminary.note: Plus two semester courses in a language or a whole course in a language (30cr), plus two 2000-level semester courses in one discipline in another faculty (40cr)

year_4_final.label: Year 4 (Final Level)
year_4_final.note: Plus elective courses and research paper totalling 36 NQF credits. Minimum 36cr from electives (all 9cr each). Must include at least one seminars and research paper elective.
